mapper.select: select id, model_name as modelName, api_url as apiUrl, api_key as apiKey, temperature, max_tokens as maxTokens, status, creator_id as creatorId, creator_role as creatorRole, manager_id as managerId, create_time as createTime from model_config where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into model_config (model_name, api_url, api_key, temperature, max_tokens, status, creator_id, creator_role, manager_id) values (#{modelName}, #{apiUrl}, #{apiKey}, #{temperature}, #{maxTokens}, #{status}, #{creatorId}, #{creatorRole}, #{managerId})
mapper.update: update model_config set model_name = #{modelName}, api_url = #{apiUrl}, api_key = #{apiKey}, temperature = #{temperature}, max_tokens = #{maxTokens}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
